chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD Cr.B.A. No.S-1140 of 2022 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 1. For orders on urgent application M.A. No.9652 /2022 2. For orders on office objection. 3. For orders on exemption application M.A. No.9653/2022 4. For hearing of main case 28.10.2022 Mian Taj Muhammad Keerio, advocate for applicant along with applicant -.-.-. 1. Urgency granted. 2. Overruled. 3. Granted. 4. It is stated that applicant is innocent but has been falsely implicated in this case out of enmity; that the applicant wants to surrender before the trial court but needs protection as he apprehendshis arrest. Without touching the merits of the case, the applicant is granted protective bail for 07 days from today subject to furnishing solvent surety in the sum of Rs.50,000/- and PR Bond of the like amount to the satisfaction of Additional Registrar of this Court. This order shall cease to have its effect on expiry of 07 days on 03.11.2022 or on surrender of the applicant before the concerned Court, whichever is earlier. Bail application stands disposed of. JUDGE Ali Haider
